title: rosa lissinensis
intro: Rosa lissinensis, also known as the Alpine Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa lissinensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce stress, improve immune function, and promote overall well-being. Rosa lissinensis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its astringent and antiseptic properties.
